summary:
Perfect! The test passes. The issue was in the pagination offset calculation in `app/app.py`. The original code had:

```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)
```

This caused an off-by-one error for all pages after the first one. I fixed it by removing the incorrect subtraction:

```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

Now the pagination works correctly:
- Page 1 shows items 0-9 (IDs 1-10)
- Page 2 shows items 10-19 (IDs 11-20)
- And so on...

The test confirms that page boundaries are now correct with no gaps or overlaps between pages.
